headline: Microsoft closes worst quarter on Wall Street since 2008 on AI concerns: 'Redmond is in a pickle'
summary: With Microsoft losing almost a quarter of its value this year, investors have reset the company's earnings multiple to the lowest since late 2022.

headline: Wall Street Price Prediction: ServiceNow Price Target Set at $185
summary: ServiceNow (NYSE:NOW) received a price target cut from Wells Fargo on Tuesday, with the firm trimming its target to $185 from $225 while maintaining an Overweight rating. The stock currently trades at $104.97, meaning even the reduced target implies meaningful upside from current levels. Wells Fargo’s message is clear: The fundamentals remain intact, but the ... headline: Do New AI Security Partnerships Quietly Recast ServiceNow’s (NOW) Role As The Enterprise Control Layer?
summary: In March 2026, Zenity, Vonage and Cohesity each announced new partnerships and integrations with ServiceNow, extending its AI platform into security, voice-enabled workflows and resilient data protection for autonomous agents across IT, HR, customer service and security operations. Together, these collaborations deepen ServiceNow’s role as a central “AI control tower” for enterprises, linking agent governance, real-time communications and data recovery into customers’ existing workflow and...

headline: US Stock Market Today S&P 500 Futures Rise On Fed Caution And Bond Jitters
summary: The Morning Bull - US Market Morning Update Tuesday, Mar, 31 2026 US stock futures are pointing higher this morning, with E mini S&P 500 contracts up about 0.8% and Nasdaq 100 futures showing a similar gain. The backdrop is a sharp rise in government borrowing costs across Europe, where 10 year bond yields in the UK and Italy have jumped as investors worry that the Iran conflict and higher oil prices could keep inflation alive. At the same time, US 10 year yields have eased to around 4.32%...

headline: Liquibase Unveils Change Intelligence and New Connectors for Governed Database Delivery
summary: AUSTIN, Texas, March 31, 2026--Liquibase, the leader in Database Change Governance, today unveiled Liquibase Change Intelligence and a new suite of Liquibase Secure Deployment Connectors, expanding how enterprises understand, govern, and operationalize database change across modern delivery environments.

headline: ServiceNow (NOW) Climbs 5.6% on Bargain-Hunting After Near Low
summary: ServiceNow Inc. (NYSE:NOW) is one of the 10 Stocks Leaving the Market in the Dust Today. headline: ServiceNow (NOW) Shares Skyrocket, What You Need To Know
summary: Shares of enterprise workflow automation company ServiceNow (NYSE:NOW) jumped 6.2% in the afternoon session after sentiment improved as President Trump indicated that the US was engaged in serious, productive talks with Iran.
